horoscope: You may begin the day feeling rather private or self-contained, dear Aries, and end it feeling considerably more interactive. The Moon enters your sign, and a Mercury-Jupiter aspect comes into play as the day advances, raising the mood and encouraging positive thinking. You're particularly well-suited for thoughts and conversations about money, family, or home life. Business thinking is excellent. You're inclined to want to share and discuss ideas with people close to you, and this can be very fruitful. Instead of repeating old patterns that are keeping you in a rut, try a different approach. This way, you can make satisfying progress on a money-making or home-related idea or project. You are looking at things broadly, making this an excellent time for bigger plans rather than details. Feedback from family can be helpful.

Good energy is with you for creating something beautiful, dear Taurus, or for creating some good memories. You express yourself with more ease, which attracts new opportunities your way. You might take on new interests or study a new topic, and possibly enjoy a learning breakthrough. A Mercury-Jupiter aspect comes into play, involving Mercury in your sign, and it encourages optimistic thinking and meaningful exchanges. You may be excited about an idea or a particular subject of study. You're especially motivated to pursue your projects, or you get a chance to talk yourself into a positive perspective. Good news may arrive now.

While you can begin the day quite focused on your responsibilities, dear Gemini, you can feel far more open as the day advances. Mercury, your planetary ruler, heads into harmony with lucky Jupiter, getting you into an optimistic mindset. You might figure out a way to handle a private matter or a problem that has been weighing you down. A sudden memory may figure strongly and positively, and it's exciting. This transit helps you see a situation positively. It not only boosts your mood but your credibility as well. You may be in a supportive role and enjoying taking care of someone now. Dreams and intuition are fertile ground for ideas, and an agreement with someone can come into the spotlight.

You can enjoy a sense of optimism today, dear Cancer, and even though you're answering calls to spontaneity, doing some planning can be exciting now. Fabulous energy is with you, sharpening your senses, especially as the day progresses. New visions of your future can motivate and inspire you as Mercury and Jupiter head into harmony. Problems are resolved more easily, and others are listening! The support of friends or incoming news and tips can figure strongly. It may be a good time to talk shop with associates, or you might run business ideas by friends. Teamwork is rewarding overall, and networking can inspire new ideas.

Today's energies are strong for thinking and planning, dear Leo. Making plans for your money, business deals, and problem-solving are all favored today, especially as the day progresses. The power of positive thinking makes anything seem possible right now. You are well-aspected for commercial activity, negotiation, and settling contracts, as long as you've done your homework. Thinking clearly brightens your mood. You're drawing upon your wisdom and experience to make fabulous decisions. Certain projects look more hopeful, and it feels good to look on the brighter side of things. Hearty, meaningful discussions might also figure strongly today.

Transits today encourage you to solve problems or enjoy some planning, dear Virgo, and might also produce some good news about education, publishing, business income, or friendship. You're feeling readier to share happiness or helpful information. It's a time that encourages thinking in the most favorable terms. You have a bigger, more optimistic view of social and happiness goals. Your planetary ruler, Mercury, forms a friendly connection with Jupiter, and you have a good sense of future trends. You're not only intrigued by new ideas and experiences, but you're also ready to map out plans to realize your goals.

Professional matters are positive today, dear Libra, and a Mercury-Jupiter transit can boost your thinking and communication. You’re in an excellent position to arrive at a mutually beneficial agreement, cooperate with others, or receive helpful feedback. This transit can also help you manage financial support issues or formulate strategies for meeting your goals. Quiet study or research can yield the answers you need and perhaps some rewards. Further, focusing on something absorbing and pouring a lot of energy into a project you care about can boost your mood. Be generous with your time and attention today for the best results. With your ruler, Venus, in a creative aspect with Saturn today, you tend to enjoy a steady pace, and it becomes you.

Today's transits are particularly strong for you on a social level, dear Scorpio, and especially on a one-to-one level. Willingness to learn from one another increases clarity and satisfaction as the day advances. People have a way of jumpstarting your thinking processes these days, with Mercury in your partnership sector, so that regular one-on-one conversations can turn into something inspirational, if only because they get your creative juices flowing. Today, you might discover that a good listener is better off. Your ability to put things into perspective can open up doors that were previously closed, not only because you're entertaining new ideas, but also because others are more willing to consider your viewpoint.

You're likely to feel especially motivated to sort out problems today, dear Sagittarius, or you particularly enjoy planning and strategizing. You're more optimistic than usual and inclined to want to share your happiness with others. In fact, an agreement or special arrangement with someone can figure strongly now. You can get much done, and there is bound to be quite a bit of relief after reducing clutter in your mind and conscience. You are especially open to new insights and understanding, and you might also lend a sensitive ear to someone's problems. You can be quite pleased with your work and the little things that you've accomplished. A Mercury-Jupiter aspect comes into influence today, and it can serve to brighten your thinking and conversations. You may be thinking up new methods and plans for self-improvement that excite you.

Positive energy for thinking and sharing is with you today, dear Capricorn, especially as the day advances. A Mercury-Jupiter transit comes into influence, and it helps conversations flow smoothly. Creative thinking can find satisfying channels right now! One-on-one exchanges stand out as particularly beneficial. Minds are open, so making changes feels natural. Personal magnetism is good, and matters of the heart can thrive. Thoughts flow, and so does the creative process! There can be much activity, including exchanging ideas, communicating with friends, and even a pleasant flood of thoughts. A happy conversation can be especially notable. You can also thoroughly enjoy where your mind takes you now.

Special and even great ideas can come to you with fresh thinking today, dear Aquarius. You may very well enjoy handling work and household details, or health can be a focus and a problem-solving area. Co-workers, family, or others who share your day can be more cooperative, which helps you feel better about what you’re doing. In fact, cooperation with others can help fuel your motivation. Someone might completely understand something you say or a goal you have in mind, which feels good. You can feel inspired to work harder or push yourself just a little more to reach a health, nutrition, or fitness goal. Making lists and planning are in pleasant focus as you turn your attention to higher, happier thoughts. New possibilities emerge.

Today’s transits benefit your communications and creative output in particular, dear Pisces, but it's an all-around mood booster. You can share encouraging words or receive positive feedback. You find yourself in general agreement with someone special, and your differences enrich both of you. You see many reasons to think positively today, and it’s easier to verbalize what you want. It can be a time to make a presentation or to win someone’s favor. There might also be exciting offers or good reviews that motivate you. You might enjoy discussing something dear to your heart.
